revision.comment: Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fue]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Fue]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fue here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fue for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{navbox
|name  = Fue
|title = {{#if:{{{list only|}}}||Japanese [[:en:Fue (flute)|Fue]]}}
|state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|border = {{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}
|image = {{#if:{{{list only|}}}||}}
|listclass = hlist
|group1 = {{#if:{{{list only|}}}||[[:en:Transverse flute|Side-blown]]}}
|list1 =
* [[Gakubue]]
* [[:en:Kagurabue|Kagurabue]]
* [[:en:Komabue|Komabue]]
* [[:en:Minteki|Minteki]]
* [[:en:Nohkan|Nōkan]]
* [[:en:Ryūteki|Ryūteki]]
* [[:en:Shinobue|Shinobue]]
* [[:en:Yokobue|Yokobue]]

|group2 = {{#if:{{{list only|}}}||[[:en:end-blown flute|End-blown]]}}
|list2 =
* [[:en:Hichiriki|Hichiriki]]
* [[:en:Hotchiku|Hotchiku]]
* [[Shakuhachi]]

}}<noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{Collapsible option}}

==See also==
*{{tl|Traditional Japanese musical instruments}}
[[Category:Japan music navigational boxes]]
}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
